displayName: TypeTalk AI - Advanced Voice Typing & AI Assistant
description:
TypeTalk AI is an intelligent voice typing and communication assistant built specifically for NVDA users.
It leverages advanced Artificial Intelligence and Google Speech Recognition services to provide high-accuracy dictation.

Key Features:
- Real-time Speech-to-Text with AI refinement.
- Smart Reply Generator: Instantly creates context-aware replies for chat apps.
- AI Writing Styles: Customize tone (Formal, Casual, Concise, Bullet Points).
- Custom Dictionary: Define voice commands to insert punctuation, specific phrases, addresses, or replace words instantly (Works Offline & Online).
- Automatic grammar correction, language translation, and emoji support.

This add-on transforms spoken words into polished text and enhances productivity, making digital communication seamless and accessible.
changelog:
v3.0 - Latest AI & NVDA Optimization
- Optimized for the latest NVDA versions ensuring seamless performance and stability.
- Integrated cutting-edge AI models for faster, smarter, and more accurate processing.
- Dynamic AI Model Support: New and updated AI models will be continuously available in the model list without requiring full add-on updates.

v2.0 - Major Feature Update
- New: Smart Reply Generator (Context & Magic Reply) for chat apps.
- New: AI Writing Style/Tone Selector (Formal, Casual, Concise, Bullet Points).
- New: Text Recovery Feature (Backup & Restore last processed text).
- New: Status Check command to hear current settings.
- Enhanced: Custom Dictionary now supports both Offline and Online modes for command replacement.
- Improved: Smart Focus detection for capturing chat context without selection.

v1.0 - Initial Official Release
- Introduced Smart Voice Typing using Google Speech Recognition.
- Integrated AI-powered grammar correction and punctuation.
- Added Real-time Translation and Emoji support.
- Implemented Welcome Wizard and Auto-Update system.
